glosses.ja: 怒っている; 激怒している

translations.fr: Je suis en colère contre toi.

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite auxiliary (copula), present indicative 1st singular; links the subject to the predicative adjective.
Predicative adjective functioning as subject complement after the copula.
Preposition governing the accusative here; introduces the target of the anger.
Personal pronoun, 2nd person singular accusative; object of the preposition 'auf'.

sentences.target: Er ist wütend über den Fehler.

translations.de: Er ist wütend über den Fehler.
translations.en: He is angry about the mistake.
translations.es: Él está enojado por el error.
translations.fr: Il est en colère à cause de l’erreur.
translations.pt: Ele está zangado por causa do erro.
translations.vi: Anh ấy giận vì lỗi đó.
translations.nl: Hij is boos om de fout.
translations.pl: On jest zły z powodu błędu.
translations.nb: Han er sint på grunn av feilen.
translations.ro: El este supărat din cauza greșelii.
translations.ja: 彼はそのミスに怒っている。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 3rd person singular nominative; subject.
Finite auxiliary (copula), present indicative 3rd singular; links subject to predicative adjective.
Predicative adjective functioning as subject complement.
Preposition selecting accusative in this usage; introduces the cause/topic of the anger.
Definite article, masculine accusative singular; agrees with 'Fehler' as object of 'über'.
Common noun, masculine accusative singular; object of the preposition 'über'.

sentences.target: Die Kundin ist wütend über die Wartezeit.
sentences.reading: /diː ˈkʊndɪn ɪst ˈvyːtnt ˈyːbɐ diː ˈvaʁtətsaɪt./

translations.de: Die Kundin ist wütend über die Wartezeit.
translations.ipa: /diː ˈkʊndɪn ɪst ˈvyːtnt ˈyːbɐ diː ˈvaʁtətsaɪt./
translations.en: The customer is angry about the wait time.
translations.es: La clienta está enojada por el tiempo de espera.
translations.fr: La cliente est en colère à cause du temps d’attente.
translations.it: La cliente è arrabbiata per l’attesa.
translations.ko: 여자 손님은 대기 시간 때문에 화가 났다.
translations.zh-Hans: 女顾客因为等候时间而生气。
translations.yue: 女客人因為等候時間而嬲。
translations.pt: A cliente está zangada por causa do tempo de espera.
translations.vi: Khách hàng nữ bực vì thời gian chờ.
translations.nl: De klant is boos over de wachttijd.
translations.hu: Az ügyfél a várakozási idő miatt mérges.
translations.hi: ग्राहिका इंतज़ार के समय से नाराज़ है.
translations.pl: Klientka jest zła z powodu czasu oczekiwania.
translations.el: Η πελάτισσα είναι θυμωμένη για τον χρόνο αναμονής.
translations.id: Pelanggan perempuan marah karena waktu tunggu.
translations.ro: Clienta este supărată din cauza timpului de așteptare.
translations.cs: Zákaznice je naštvaná kvůli době čekání.
translations.ja: 女性客は待ち時間に怒っている。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, feminine nominative singular; agrees with 'Kundin' (subject).
Common noun, feminine nominative singular; subject of the clause.
Finite auxiliary (copula), present indicative 3rd singular; links subject to the predicative adjective.
Predicative adjective functioning as subject complement.
Preposition selecting accusative in this usage; introduces the cause/topic.
Definite article, feminine accusative singular; agrees with 'Wartezeit' as object of 'über'.
Common noun, feminine accusative singular; object of the preposition 'über'.

sentences.target: Sie wirkt wütend im vollen Bus.

translations.de: Sie wirkt wütend im vollen Bus.
translations.en: She seems angry in the crowded bus.
translations.es: Ella parece enojada en el autobús lleno.
translations.fr: Elle a l’air en colère dans le bus bondé.
translations.ko: 사람이 많은 버스에서 그녀는 화가 나 보여.
translations.zh-Hans: 她在拥挤的公交车上看起来生气。
translations.yue: 佢喺迫滿嘅巴士上面睇嚟好嬲。
translations.ru: Она выглядит сердитой в переполненном автобусе.
translations.pt: Ela parece zangada no ônibus lotado.
translations.vi: Cô ấy trông tức giận trên chiếc xe buýt đông người.
translations.ar: هي تبدو غاضبة في الحافلة المزدحمة.
translations.nl: Ze lijkt boos in de volle bus.
translations.uk: Вона здається сердитою в переповненому автобусі.
translations.hi: भीड़ भरी बस में वह गुस्से में लगती है.
translations.pl: Ona wydaje się zła w zatłoczonym autobusie.
translations.nb: Hun virker sint på den overfylte bussen.
translations.id: Dia terlihat marah di bus yang penuh.
translations.sv: Hon verkar arg på den fullsatta bussen.
translations.ro: Ea pare supărată în autobuzul aglomerat.
translations.cs: Ona vypadá naštvaně v přeplněném autobuse.
translations.da: Hun virker vred i den overfyldte bus.
translations.ja: 彼女は混んだバスの中で怒っているように見える。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 3rd person singular nominative; subject.
Finite lexical verb, present indicative 3rd singular; copular-like verb taking a predicative complement.
Predicative adjective complement to 'wirkt' describing the subject's apparent state.
Preposition (contraction of 'in dem'); governs dative here to mark location.
Attributive adjective with weak inflection (-en) agreeing with masculine dative singular 'Bus' under definite article.
Common noun, masculine dative singular; object of the preposition 'im' (in + dem).
